output.warning: Complete full course even if feeling better. Report severe diarrhea or rash.

output.warning: Blood thinner - risk of bleeding. Regular INR monitoring required. Avoid activities with injury risk.
output.action: Take exactly as prescribed at same time daily. Report any unusual bleeding immediately.
